creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Loïc,

The tarball of these maintenance releases are much smaller than the regular releases: e.g. 45,6 Mb for V7_5_2.tgz vs. 360 Mb for opencascade-7.5.0.tgz.

Do you know how to get the missing bits? Maybe we have to untar V7_5_2 on top of V7.5.0 and make a tarball from that?
